title: feat: add GPT Realtime 2.1
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds `gpt-realtime-2.1` as the default realtime model while keeping `gpt-realtime-2` available.
- Routes both models through the verified Azure Realtime endpoint and maps 2.1 to the `gpt-realtime-2-1` deployment.
- Updates realtime schema, model discovery, API docs, tests, and pricing snapshot.
- Validates Azure `session.created`, 17 realtime tests, 6 docs tests, typecheck, Biome, and pricing snapshot.

gist.headline: The hive talks faster
gist.blurb: Realtime got a fresh set of vocal cords. GPT Realtime 2.1 is now the default, while the previous model remains on the branch for anyone who needs it.
gist.summary: Added gpt-realtime-2.1 as the default realtime model, routed through the verified Azure Realtime endpoint as the gpt-realtime-2-1 deployment, while keeping gpt-realtime-2 available.
gist.impact: Realtime API builders now get GPT Realtime 2.1 by default with validated Azure session creation, updated model discovery and schema support, and continued access to gpt-realtime-2.
gist.visual_concept: Polly is a cozy radio host or sound engineer tuning a retro lime-green CRT audio console labeled "REALTIME 2.1." Glowing waveform flowers grow from pots around the console, while the eager monitor robot watches a clean Azure-blue-pastel signal arrive and confirms the connection; this represents a new default realtime voice model with the older channel still available.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush, light blue wings, and tiny studio headphones, tuning a retro CRT audio console glowing prominently lime green (#ecf874) with a small pixel label reading "REALTIME 2.1"; beside her, a chunky monitor robot happily watches warm sound-wave flowers bloom from code-planters. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft lime green and pastel lavender-to-cream gradients, warm lighting, subtle CRT scanlines, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
